hotels.name: The Ford
hotels.description_fr:
Overlooking the Sheen River and Caha Mountains, The Ford B&B lies around 11 km from pretty Kenmare on Ireland’s Ring of Kerry. It has free parking and WiFi and offers a range of home-cooked breakfasts.

Rooms are elegantly furnished and include a wardrobe and seating area. There is also an en suite shower or bath with a hairdryer and toiletries supplied.

A freshly cooked full Irish breakfast is served at The Ford B&B, and the menu also includes homemade Kenmare smoked salmon with scrambled eggs. 

The Ford is located along the scenic Beara Way, and the Bonane Heritage Park is a 10-minute walk away. You can follow the Kenmare Heritage Trail to see sights including Henry Street and Killowen Church.

Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement.
hotels.description_en:
Overlooking the Sheen River and Caha Mountains, The Ford B&B lies around 11 km from pretty Kenmare on Ireland’s Ring of Kerry. It has free parking and WiFi and offers a range of home-cooked breakfasts.

Rooms are elegantly furnished and include a wardrobe and seating area. There is also an en suite shower or bath with a hairdryer and toiletries supplied.

A freshly cooked full Irish breakfast is served at The Ford B&B, and the menu also includes homemade Kenmare smoked salmon with scrambled eggs. 

The Ford is located along the scenic Beara Way, and the Bonane Heritage Park is a 10-minute walk away. You can follow the Kenmare Heritage Trail to see sights including Henry Street and Killowen Church.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.2 for a two-person trip.

hotels.name: Rookery Lane Food and Lodging
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Rookery Lane Food and Lodging se trouve à Kenmare, à respectivement 31 km et 31 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : INEC Killarney et Montagne Carrantuohill. Il comprend des hébergements dotés d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. Il est installé à respectivement 33 km, 1,4 km et 6,5 km de : Cathédrale Sainte-Marie du Cap, Kenmare Golf Club et Ring of Kerry Golf & Country Club. Cet établissement non-fumeurs vous accueille à 30 km de : Abbaye de Muckross.

Les hébergements comportent une armoire, une télévision à écran plat, une salle de bains privative, du linge de lit et des serviettes. Vous bénéficierez d’une bouilloire. Certains hébergements possèdent également un balcon. Vous profiterez aussi d’un réfrigérateur.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Rookery Lane Food and Lodging in Kenmare offers a guest house with free WiFi, a kitchenette, and private bathrooms. Each room includes a tea and coffee maker, hairdryer, dining table, refrigerator, seating area, and free toiletries.
Modern Amenities: Guests can enjoy streaming services, a balcony, microwave, shower, TV, and parquet floors. Additional amenities include an electric kettle, wardrobe, and toaster.
Convenient Location: Located on Bridge Street, the property is a 16-minute walk from Kenmare Golf Club. Nearby attractions include Ring of Kerry Golf & Country Club (7 km), Moll's Gap (10 km), and Gleninchaquin Park (20 km). Kerry Airport is 48 km away.
hotels.description_es:
Rookery Lane Food and Lodging se encuentra en Kenmare, a 31 km de Auditorio INEC y a 31 km de Carrantuohill, y ofrece habitaciones con wifi gratis. El alojamiento está a unos 33 km de Catedral de Santa María, a 16 min a pie de Kenmare Golf Club y a 6,5 km de Ring of Kerry Golf & Country Club. Este alojamiento libre de humo está a 30 km de Abadía de Muckross.

En el hostal o pensión, cada habitación dispone de armario, TV de pantalla plana, baño privado, ropa de cama y toallas. Rookery Lane Food and Lodging dispone de algunas habitaciones con balcón, y todas tienenhervidor. Todas las habitaciones cuentan con nevera.

Moll's Gap está a 10 km del alojamiento, y Gleninchaquin Park está a 20 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Kerry) está a 48 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Rookery Lane Food and Lodging localiza-se em Kenmare, a 31 km de INEC e 31 km de Montanha de Carrauntoohil, e apresenta quartos com acesso Wi-Fi gratuito. O alojamento está a cerca de 33 km de Catedral de Santa Maria, a 16 minutos a pé de Kenmare Golf Club e a 6,5 km de Ring of Kerry Golf & Country Club. Este alojamento não fumador encontra-se a 30 km de Abadia de Muckross.

No alojamento, cada quarto está equipado com roupeiro, televisão de ecrã plano, casa de banho privativa, roupa de cama e toalhas. Cada quarto está equipado com chaleira, enquanto alguns têm varanda. Todos os quartos providenciam um frigorífico.

Moll's Gap fica a 10 km de Rookery Lane Food and Lodging, enquanto Gleninchaquin Park está a 20 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Kerry fica a 48 km de distância.
hotels.description_it:
Situato a Kenmare, a 31 km da Arena Indoor INEC e 31 km da Monte Carrantuohill, Rookery Lane Food and Lodging prevede camere con WiFi gratuito. La struttura si trova a circa 33 km da Cattedrale di Santa Maria, 1,4 km da Kenmare Golf Club e 6,5 km da Ring of Kerry Golf & Country Club. L'alloggio è interamente non fumatori ed è ubicato a 30 km da Abbazia di Muckross.

Presso questo affittacamere, tutte le camere sono dotate di un armadio, una TV a schermo piatto, un bagno privato, le lenzuola e gli asciugamani. Rookery Lane Food and Lodging propone alcune camere che hanno un balcone, e inoltre ogni camera è dotata di un bollitore elettrico. Tutte le camere presentano un frigorifero.

Passo di Moll è a 10 km da questa struttura, mentre Gleninchaquin Park si trova a 20 km dalla struttura.

hotels.name: House 15
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement House 15 se trouve à Kenmare, à respectivement 31 km et 31 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Abbaye de Muckross et INEC Killarney. Il propose un bar et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.

L’établissement dispose d’une télévision à écran plat, ainsi que d'une salle de bains privative comprenant des articles de toilette gratuits, un sèche-cheveux et une douche. Certains logements disposent d’une terrasse et/ou d’un balcon avec une vue sur la montagne.

Un petit-déjeuner buffet, continental ou végétarien est servi sur place.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 32 km et 34 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Montagne Carrantuohill et Cathédrale Sainte-Marie du Cap. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Kerry) est à 49 km.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: House 15 in Kenmare offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and parquet floors. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and free toiletries.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a bar and free WiFi, along with daily housekeeping service. The property features a terrace, balcony, and outdoor dining area, providing mountain views.
Delicious Breakfast: A continental buffet breakfast is available, including vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. Fresh pastries, cheese, fruits, and juice are served each morning.
Prime Location: Located 49 km from Kerry Airport, House 15 is a 14-minute walk from Kenmare Golf Club. Nearby attractions include Ring of Kerry Golf & Country Club (7 km) and Muckross Abbey (31 km).
hotels.description_es:
House 15 se encuentra en Kenmare y ofrece alojamiento con bar y wifi gratis a 31 km de Abadía de Muckross y a 31 km de Auditorio INEC.

El bed and breakfast ofrece TV de pantalla plana y baño privado con artículos de aseo gratuitos, secador de pelo y ducha. Algunas unidades incluyen terraza y/o balcón con vistas a la montaña.

En el alojamiento se puede disfrutar de un desayuno buffet, continental o vegetariano.

Carrantuohill está a 32 km del alojamiento, y Catedral de Santa María está a 34 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Kerry) está a 49 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,8 para viajes de dos personas.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
House 15 localiza-se em Kenmare, a 31 km de Abadia de Muckross e a 31 km de INEC, e fornece acomodações com acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e um bar.

O alojamento possui uma televisão de ecrã plano e uma casa de banho privativa com produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos, um secador de cabelo e chuveiro. Algumas unidades incluem terraço e/ou varanda com vista da montanha.

Os hóspedes podem apreciar pequeno-almoço buffet, continental ou vegetariano no alojamento.

Montanha de Carrauntoohil fica a 32 km de House 15, enquanto Catedral de Santa Maria está a 34 km de distância. O Aeroporto de Kerry fica a 49 km da propriedade.

Os casais gostam particularmente da localização – deram uma pontuação de 9,8 para uma viagem a dois.
hotels.description_it:
House 15 è a Kenmare e prevede alloggi con bar e WiFi gratuito, 31 km da Abbazia di Muckross e 31 km da Arena Indoor INEC.

Questo bed and breakfast offre una TV a schermo piatto e un bagno privato con set di cortesia, asciugacapelli e doccia. Alcune unità includono una terrazza e/o un balcone con vista sulla montagna.

Presso la struttura potrete gustare una colazione a buffet, continentale o vegetariana.

Monte Carrantuohill è a 32 km da House 15, mentre Cattedrale di Santa Maria si trova a 34 km di distanza. Aeroporto di Kerry si trova a 49 km dalla struttura.

Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,8 per un viaggio a due.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: The Cosy Nest - An Nead Cluthar
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement The Cosy Nest - An Nead Cluthar se trouve à Kilkenny, à respectivement 1,2 km et 2,2 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Gare de Kilkenny et Château de Kilkenny. Il propose une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, une terrasse et la climatisation. Cet appartement propose un balcon.

Cet appartement comprend une télévision à écran plat. L’hébergement possède une kitchenette équipée d’un réfrigérateur, d’un lave-vaisselle et d’un micro-ondes. Il comprend également une douche, un sèche-cheveux et des chaussons.

Un service de location de vélos est disponible sur place.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 21 km et 33 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Mount Juliet Golf Club et Carrigleade Golf Course. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Dublin) est à 130 km.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Living: The Cosy Nest - An Nead Cluthar in Kilkenny offers a ground-floor apartment with a terrace and free WiFi. Guests enjoy air-conditioning, a kitchenette, and a private bathroom.
Modern Amenities: The apartment features a balcony, streaming services, and a dining area. Additional amenities include a sofa bed, parquet floors, and a washing machine.
Convenient Location: Located 130 km from Dublin Airport, the property is a 14-minute walk from Kilkenny Railway Station. Nearby attractions include Kilkenny Castle (2.2 km) and Mount Juliet Golf Club (21 km).
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.2 for a two-person trip.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
The Cosy Nest - An Nead Cluthar se encuentra en Kilkenny, a 14 min a pie de Estación de tren Kilkenny y a 2,2 km de Castillo de Kilkenny, y ofrece wifi gratis, terraza y aire acondicionado. Este apartamento ofrece alojamiento con balcón.

El apartamento dispone de TV de pantalla plana. La zona de cocina cuenta con nevera, lavavajillas y microondas, y hay ducha, secador de pelo y zapatillas.

El apartamento ofrece servicio de alquiler de bicicletas.

Club de golf Mount Juliet está a 21 km del alojamiento, y Campo de golf Carrigleade está a 33 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Dublín) está a 130 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,2 para viajes de dos personas.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
The Cosy Nest - An Nead Cluthar localiza-se em Kilkenny, a 14 minutos a pé de Estação Ferroviária de Kilkenny e 2,2 km de Castelo Kilkenny, e dispõe de acesso Wi-Fi gratuito, um terraço e ar condicionado. O alojamento foi construído em 2025 e apresenta acomodações com varanda, .

Este apartamento tem uma televisão de ecrã plano. A kitchenette dispõe de um frigorífico, uma máquina de lavar louça e um micro-ondas, e há chuveiro com um secador de cabelo e chinelos.

The Cosy Nest - An Nead Cluthar disponibiliza um serviço de aluguer de bicicletas.

Clube de Golfe Mount Juliet fica a 21 km de The Cosy Nest - An Nead Cluthar, enquanto Campo de Golfe Carrigleade fica a 33 km de distância. O Aeroporto de Dublin fica a 130 km da propriedade.
hotels.description_it:
Situato a Kilkenny, a 1,2 km da Stazione Ferroviaria di Kilkenny e a 2,2 km da Castello di Kilkenny, The Cosy Nest - An Nead Cluthar è un alloggio che offre il WiFi gratuito, una terrazza e l’aria condizionata. Questo appartamento prevede un alloggio con balcone.

Questo appartamento ha una TV a schermo piatto. L'angolo cottura dispone di frigorifero, lavastoviglie e microonde, e l’alloggio dispone di doccia, asciugacapelli e pantofole.

Un servizio di noleggio biciclette è disponibile presso questo appartamento.

Mount Juliet Golf Club è a 21 km da The Cosy Nest - An Nead Cluthar, mentre Campo da Golf di Carrigleade si trova a 33 km di distanza. Aeroporto di Dublino si trova a 130 km dalla struttura.

Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,2 per un viaggio a due.

hotels.name: Sandbury Town House
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Sandbury Town House vous accueille dans le centre de Kilkenny, à respectivement 500 mètres et 1 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Château de Kilkenny et Gare de Kilkenny. Il comprend des hébergements avec une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.
Vous séjournerez à respectivement 18 km et 34 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Mount Juliet Golf Club et Carrigleade Golf Course.
Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 9,9 pour un séjour à deux.
Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Sandbury Town House in Kilkenny offers family rooms with private bathrooms. Each room includes a tea and coffee maker, hairdryer, work desk, free toiletries, shower, carpeted floor, TV, electric kettle, and wardrobe.
Essential Facilities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, bicycle parking, and a welcoming host. The property is highly rated for its convenient location, room cleanliness, and attentive host.
Local Attractions: Kilkenny Castle is a 5-minute walk away, while Kilkenny Railway Station lies less than 1 km from the property. Nearby attractions include Mount Juliet Golf Club (18 km) and Carlow Courthouse (40 km).
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.9 for a two-person trip.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Sandbury Town House está en el centro de Kilkenny, a 5 min a pie de Castillo de Kilkenny y a 1 km de Estación de tren Kilkenny, y ofrece alojamiento con wifi gratis.
Club de golf Mount Juliet está a 18 km del alojamiento, y Campo de golf Carrigleade está a 34 km.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,9 para viajes de dos personas.
Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©

Sandbury Town House encontra-se no centro de Kilkenny, a 5 minutos a pé de Castelo Kilkenny e a menos de 1 km de Estação Ferroviária de Kilkenny, e apresenta acomodações com acesso Wi-Fi gratuito.
Clube de Golfe Mount Juliet fica a 18 km de Sandbury Town House, enquanto Campo de Golfe Carrigleade está a 34 km da propriedade.

hotels.name: The Tholsel Bar and Townhouse Kilkenny
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement The Tholsel Bar and Townhouse Kilkenny bénéficie d’un emplacement stratégique dans le centre de Kilkenny. Il comprend un bar et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l’ensemble de ses locaux. Il se situe à respectivement 800 mètres, 18 km et 33 km de : Gare de Kilkenny, Mount Juliet Golf Club et Carrigleade Golf Course. Cet établissement non-fumeurs vous accueille à 300 mètres de : Château de Kilkenny.

Les hébergements comportent un bureau, une télévision à écran plat, une salle de bains privative, du linge de lit et des serviettes. Les hébergements disposent d'une douche, et certains comprennent également un coin salon. Vous profiterez d’une armoire et d’une machine à café.
hotels.description_en:
Prime City Centre Location: The Tholsel Bar and Townhouse Kilkenny is situated in Kilkenny city centre, offering easy access to key attractions. Kilkenny Castle is a 3-minute walk away, while Kilkenny Railway Station lies 800 metres nearby.
Comfortable Accommodations: Each room features a private bathroom with a walk-in shower, tea and coffee maker, and free toiletries. Additional amenities include a work desk, TV, and wardrobe, ensuring a pleasant stay.
On-Site Facilities: Guests can enjoy a bar and free WiFi, complemented by daily housekeeping service and an electric vehicle charging station. Paid off-site parking is available for those travelling by car.
hotels.description_es:
The Tholsel Bar and Townhouse Kilkenny es un alojamiento con una ubicación ideal en el centro de Kilkenny que dispone de wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento y bar. El alojamiento se encuentra a 9 min a pie de Estación de tren Kilkenny, a 18 km de Club de golf Mount Juliet y a 33 km de Campo de golf Carrigleade. Este alojamiento libre de humo está a 3 min a pie de Castillo de Kilkenny.

En el hostal o pensión, cada habitación dispone de escritorio, TV de pantalla plana, baño privado, ropa de cama y toallas. Todas las habitaciones cuentan con armario y cafetera.

La clientela puede practicar actividades en Kilkenny y alrededores, como ciclismo.

Leinster Hills Golf Club está a 35 km del alojamiento, y Palacio de Justicia de Carlow está a 38 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Com uma localização atrativa no centro de Kilkenny, The Tholsel Bar and Townhouse Kilkenny apresenta acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade e um bar. O alojamento situa-se a 9 minutos a pé de Estação Ferroviária de Kilkenny, a 18 km de Clube de Golfe Mount Juliet e a 33 km de Campo de Golfe Carrigleade. Este alojamento não fumador encontra-se a 3 minutos a pé de Castelo Kilkenny.

No alojamento, cada quarto está equipado com secretária, televisão de ecrã plano, casa de banho privativa, roupa de cama e toalhas. Todos os quartos providenciam roupeiro e máquina de café.

Os hóspedes de The Tholsel Bar and Townhouse Kilkenny poderão desfrutar de atividades em Kilkenny e arredores, como ciclismo.
hotels.description_it:
In un punto attraente nel centro di Kilkenny, The Tholsel Bar and Townhouse Kilkenny propone il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura e un bar. L’alloggio è posizionato a 800 metri da Stazione Ferroviaria di Kilkenny, 18 km da Mount Juliet Golf Club e 33 km da Campo da Golf di Carrigleade. L'alloggio è interamente non fumatori ed è ubicato a 300 metri da Castello di Kilkenny.

Presso questo affittacamere, tutte le camere sono dotate di una scrivania, una TV a schermo piatto, un bagno privato, le lenzuola e gli asciugamani. Tutte le camere presentano un armadio e una macchina da caffè.

Gli ospiti di The Tholsel Bar and Townhouse Kilkenny potranno svagarsi con varie attività a Kilkenny e dintorni, come il ciclismo.

hotels.name: Killarney Glamping at the Grove, Suites and Lodges
hotels.description_fr:
Le Killarney Glamping propose des suites Glamping et des hébergements de luxe, parfaits pour des séjours individuels.

Chaque suite glamping comprend une chambre spacieuse avec chauffage, lit double, literie de luxe, couverture électrique, tapis de coco et chauffage. La salle de bains privative est pourvue de toilettes, d'une douche et d'un lavabo. Chaque couple dispose de sa propre cuisine extérieure couverte avec un barbecue à gaz, une cuisinière à gaz, un mini-réfrigérateur, une table à manger et un banc. Profitez de la vue depuis votre terrasse privée avec chauffage, sièges et éclairage. Vous pourrez profiter gratuitement de jeux de société.

Les Lodges disposent de chambres dotées de grands lits king-size et de têtes de lit rembourrées.
hotels.description_en:
Killarney Glamping offers both Glamping Suites and Luxury Lodges, perfect for individual stays.

Each glamping suite includes a spacious bedroom with heating, double bed, luxury bedding, electric blanket, coir carpet and heating. The en-suite private bathroom contains a toilet, shower and sink. Each couple has their own covered outdoor kitchen with a gas barbecue, gas hob, mini-fridge, dining table and bench. Take in the view from your private decked patio complete with heat, seating and lighting. Guests can make use the complimentary board games.

The Lodges have bedrooms boasting large king-size beds and floor to ceiling upholstered headboards.
hotels.description_es:
El Killarney Glamping ofrece suites Glamping y lodges de lujo, perfectos para estancias individuales.

Cada suite glamping incluye un amplio dormitorio con calefacción, cama doble, ropa de cama de lujo, manta eléctrica, moqueta y calefacción. El baño privado incluye aseo, ducha y lavabo. Cada pareja tiene su propia cocina cubierta al aire libre con barbacoa de gas, fogones de gas, nevera pequeña, mesa de comedor y banco. Podrá disfrutar de las vistas desde su patio privado cubierto con calefacción, asientos e iluminación. Los huéspedes pueden utilizar los juegos de mesa gratuitos.

Los Lodges disponen de dormitorios con camas extragrandes grandes y cabeceros tapizados de suelo a techo.
hotels.description_pt:
Killarney Glamping offers both Glamping Suites and Luxury Lodges, perfect for individual stays.

Each glamping suite includes a spacious bedroom with heating, double bed, luxury bedding, electric blanket, coir carpet and heating. The en-suite private bathroom contains a toilet, shower and sink. Each couple has their own covered outdoor kitchen with a gas barbecue, gas hob, mini-fridge, dining table and bench. Take in the view from your private decked patio complete with heat, seating and lighting. Guests can make use the complimentary board games.

The Lodges have bedrooms boasting large king-size beds and floor to ceiling upholstered headboards.
hotels.description_it:
Killarney Glamping offers both Glamping Suites and Luxury Lodges, perfect for individual stays.

Each glamping suite includes a spacious bedroom with heating, double bed, luxury bedding, electric blanket, coir carpet and heating. The en-suite private bathroom contains a toilet, shower and sink. Each couple has their own covered outdoor kitchen with a gas barbecue, gas hob, mini-fridge, dining table and bench. Take in the view from your private decked patio complete with heat, seating and lighting. Guests can make use the complimentary board games.

The Lodges have bedrooms boasting large king-size beds and floor to ceiling upholstered headboards.

hotels.name: Gleann Fia Country House
hotels.description_fr:
Located just 1.5 km from Killarney High Street, Gleann Fia Country House offers guests e car charging and free parking. Located on the river Deenagh with acres of wild garden. We are located at V93 XY01 on a country road with no footpath or lighting. Use of a car or taxi is advisable.

The Guesthouse has a patio seating area and all guests rooms have scenic views of woodland or river. The bedrooms are individually decorated and all have en suite bathrooms / wet rooms, walk in showers with toiletries and bathrobes. Rooms also offer satellite TV, WiFi and seating area.

Breakfast served daily with freshly brewed Arabica coffee, loose-leaf breakfast tea and a buffet table with homemade breads, yogurts, preserves, honey, cheese, cereals, fresh fruits and juice.
hotels.description_en:
Located just 1.5 km from Killarney High Street, Gleann Fia Country House offers guests e car charging and free parking. Located on the river Deenagh with acres of wild garden. We are located at V93 XY01 on a country road with no footpath or lighting. Use of a car or taxi is advisable.

The Guesthouse has a patio seating area and all guests rooms have scenic views of woodland or river. The bedrooms are individually decorated and all have en suite bathrooms / wet rooms, walk in showers with toiletries and bathrobes. Rooms also offer satellite TV, WiFi and seating area.

Breakfast served daily with freshly brewed Arabica coffee, loose-leaf breakfast tea and a buffet table with homemade breads, yogurts, preserves, honey, cheese, cereals, fresh fruits and juice.

hotels.name: Loch Lein Country House
hotels.description_fr:
This friendly and relaxed hotel has superb views over Killarney's Lower Lake and MacGillicuddy Reeks. It is a gateway to the Ring of Kerry on the shores of Loch Lein.

It is ideal for the hills, national parks and world-class golf courses of Kerry.

The spacious non-smoking bedrooms have many thoughtful features. Enjoy a drink in the lounge.

Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 9,7 pour un séjour à deux.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.

hotels.name: Aira Lodge Accommodation
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Aira Lodge Accommodation vous accueille à Kinvara, à 27 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Galway Greyhound Stadium. Il comprend un jardin, un salon commun et un parking privé gratuit. Disposant d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, cette maison d'hôtes est à respectivement 29 km et 30 km environ de : Gare de Galway et Collégiale de Saint-Nicolas. Cet établissement non-fumeurs se trouve à 29 km de : Eyre Square.

Les hébergements comportent une armoire, une télévision à écran plat, une salle de bains privative, du linge de lit et des serviettes. Vous profiterez aussi d’un réfrigérateur.

L’établissement Aira Lodge Accommodation sert un petit-déjeuner buffet ou continental.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Aira Lodge Accommodation in Kinvara offers a welcoming guest house experience with a beautiful garden and free WiFi. Guests can relax in the lounge or outdoor seating area, and enjoy the picnic area for al fresco dining.
Modern Amenities: The property features private bathrooms with free toiletries, streaming services, and a coffee machine. Additional amenities include a dining table, refrigerator, microwave, and TV, ensuring a comfortable and convenient stay.
Convenient Location: Located 60 km from Shannon Airport, the guest house is close to attractions such as Galway Greyhound Stadium (27 km), Eyre Square (28 km), and the Cliffs of Moher (48 km). Free on-site private parking is available for guests.
hotels.description_es:
Aira Lodge Accommodation está en Kinvara, a 27 km de Estadio Greyhound de Galway, y dispone de alojamiento con jardín, parking privado gratis y salón de uso común. El alojamiento está a unos 29 km de Plaza Eyre, a 29 km de Estación de tren de Galway y a 30 km de Iglesia St. Nicholas' Collegiate. El hostal o pensión libre de humo dispone de wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento.

En el hostal o pensión, las habitaciones incluyen armario, TV de pantalla plana, baño privado, ropa de cama y toallas. Todas las habitaciones cuentan con nevera.

En Aira Lodge Accommodation se puede disfrutar de un desayuno buffet o continental.

Universidad Nacional de Galway está a 30 km del alojamiento, y An Spidéal está a 45 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Shannon) está a 60 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Aira Lodge Accommodation encontra-se em Kinvara, a 27 km de Estádio Galway Greyhound, e apresenta acomodações com um jardim, estacionamento privado gratuito e um salão partilhado. Esta casa de hóspedes disponibiliza acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e está a cerca de 29 km de Estação Ferroviária de Galway e a 30 km de Igreja Colegiada de São Nicolau. Este alojamento não fumador localiza-se a 29 km de Praça Eyre.

No alojamento, cada quarto está equipado com roupeiro, televisão de ecrã plano, casa de banho privativa, roupa de cama e toalhas. Todos os quartos providenciam um frigorífico.

Os hóspedes podem desfrutar de pequeno-almoço buffet ou continental em Aira Lodge Accommodation.

Universidade Nacional de Galway fica a 30 km de Aira Lodge Accommodation, enquanto Spiddal está a 45 km da propriedade.
hotels.description_it:
Ubicato a Kinvara, a 27 km da Galway Greyhound Stadium, Aira Lodge Accommodation propone un giardino, un parcheggio privato gratuito e una sala comune. A circa 29 km da Stazione ferroviaria di Galway, l'affittacamere offre il WiFi gratuito e dista 30 km da St. Nicholas Collegiate Church. L'alloggio è interamente non fumatori ed è situato a 29 km da Eyre Square.

Presso questo affittacamere, tutte le camere sono provviste di un armadio, una TV a schermo piatto, un bagno privato, le lenzuola e gli asciugamani. Tutte le camere presentano un frigorifero.

Presso Aira Lodge Accommodation potrete gustare una colazione a buffet o continentale.

National University of Galway è a 30 km da questa struttura, mentre Villaggio di Spiddal - An Spidéal si trova a 45 km dalla struttura.

hotels.name: Silver Valley Glamping
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement Silver Valley Glamping offre une vue sur la mer, à environ 39 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Galway Greyhound Stadium. Il propose un patio et une bouilloire. Cet hébergement est installé à 38 km de : Falaises de Moher. Il possède une terrasse et un parking privé gratuit.

Cet appartement se compose de 1 chambre séparée, de 1 salle de bains, et d’un coin salon.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 40 km et 40 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Eyre Square et Gare de Galway. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Shannon) est à 70 km.

Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 9,2 pour un séjour à deux.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Living Space: Silver Valley Glamping in New Quay offers a one-bedroom apartment with a terrace and free WiFi. The property features a dining area, kitchen, and a sofa for relaxation.
Modern Amenities: Guests can enjoy sea and garden views, a patio, and outdoor furniture. The apartment includes a refrigerator, microwave, and soundproofing for a comfortable stay.
Convenient Location: Located 38 km from the Cliffs of Moher and 70 km from Shannon Airport, the apartment provides easy access to local attractions. Free on-site private parking is available.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.2 for a two-person trip.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Silver Valley Glamping, que cuenta con vistas al mar, dispone de alojamiento con patio y hervidor, y está a unos 39 km de Estadio Greyhound de Galway. El alojamiento, que se encuentra a 38 km de Acantilados de Moher, ofrece terraza y parking privado gratis.

Este apartamento consta de 1 dormitorio independiente, 1 baño y una zona de estar.

Plaza Eyre está a 40 km del alojamiento, y Estación de tren de Galway está a 40 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Shannon) está a 70 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,2 para viajes de dos personas.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©

Este apartamento tem 1 quarto, 1 casa de banho, e uma área de estar.

Praça Eyre fica a 40 km de Silver Valley Glamping, enquanto Estação Ferroviária de Galway está a 40 km de distância. O Aeroporto de Shannon fica a 70 km da propriedade.

Con vista sul mare, Silver Valley Glamping prevede un alloggio con patio e bollitore elettrico, a circa 39 km da Galway Greyhound Stadium. Situata a 38 km da Scogliere di Moher, la struttura mette a disposizione una terrazza e il parcheggio privato gratuito.

Questo appartamento comprende 1 camera da letto, 1 bagno e un’area salotto.

Eyre Square è a 40 km da questo appartamento, mentre Stazione ferroviaria di Galway si trova a 40 km di distanza. Aeroporto di Shannon si trova a 70 km dalla struttura.

hotels.name: 1 Windermere
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Kinvara, l’hébergement 1 Windermere met à votre disposition une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et offre une vue sur la mer. Cette maison de vacances est à respectivement 27 km et 28 km de : Galway Greyhound Stadium et Eyre Square.

Cette maison de vacances possède 3 chambres, une télévision, une cuisine équipée avec un réfrigérateur et un lave-vaisselle, un lave-linge, ainsi que 2 salles de bains avec une douche.

Vous pourrez profiter d’un jardin sur place et pratiquer le golf et la pêche dans les environs.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 28 km et 30 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Gare de Galway et Collégiale de Saint-Nicolas. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Shannon) est à 58 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: 1 Windermere in Kinvara offers a spacious holiday home with three bedrooms and two bathrooms. The property features a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, and a comfortable seating area.
Outdoor Amenities: Guests can enjoy a beautiful garden and take in sea views from the terrace. Free WiFi is available throughout the property, ensuring connectivity during the stay.
Local Attractions: Located 27 km from Galway Greyhound Stadium and Eyre Square, 28 km from Galway Railway Station and St. Nicholas Collegiate Church, and 47 km from the Cliffs of Moher. Shannon Airport is 58 km away.
Activities: Activities available include golfing, fishing, and cycling. The surrounding area offers various opportunities for outdoor enthusiasts.
hotels.description_es:
1 Windermere es un alojamiento con wifi gratis y vistas al mar que está en Kinvara. Esta casa o chalet está a 27 km de Estadio Greyhound de Galway y a 28 km de Plaza Eyre.

La casa o chalet tiene 3 dormitorios, TV, una cocina equipada con nevera y lavavajillas, lavadora y 2 baños con ducha.

La clientela de este alojamiento puede practicar golf y pesca en los alrededores, o disfrutar del jardín.

Estación de tren de Galway está a 28 km del alojamiento, y Iglesia St. Nicholas' Collegiate está a 30 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Shannon) está a 58 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
1 Windermere encontra-se em Kinvara, a 27 km de Estádio Galway Greyhound e 28 km de Praça Eyre, numa área onde pode desfrutar de ciclismo. O alojamento apresenta vistas do mar e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade.

Esta casa de férias tem 3 quartos, uma televisão, uma cozinha equipada com frigorífico e máquina de lavar louça, uma máquina de lavar roupa e 2 casas de banho com chuveiro.

Os hóspedes de 1 Windermere podem praticar golfe e pesca nas proximidades, ou aproveitar ao máximo o jardim.

Estação Ferroviária de Galway fica a 28 km de 1 Windermere, enquanto Igreja Colegiada de São Nicolau está a 30 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Shannon fica a 58 km de distância.

A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
1 Windermere si trova a Kinvara, a 27 km da Galway Greyhound Stadium e 28 km da Eyre Square, in una zona dove potrete praticare il ciclismo. La struttura presenta la vista sul mare e il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura.

Questa casa vacanze offre 3 camere da letto, una TV, una cucina con frigorifero e lavastoviglie, una lavatrice e 2 bagni con doccia.

Durante il vostro soggiorno presso questa casa vacanze, potrete praticare il golf e la pesca nelle vicinanze o usufruire del giardino.

Stazione ferroviaria di Galway è a 28 km da 1 Windermere, mentre St. Nicholas Collegiate Church si trova a 30 km dalla struttura. Aeroporto di Shannon si trova a 58 km di distanza.
